name: OpenPix
description: Brazilian Pix payment gateway with REST API, SDKs for PHP/Ruby/Java/React, and real-time reconciliation for businesses.

seo.title: OpenPix — Payment Gateway / PSP
seo.meta_description: OpenPix: Brazilian Pix payment gateway with REST API, SDKs for PHP/Ruby/Java/React, and real-time reconciliation for businesses.

when_to_use: Real-time Pix payment collection with instant reconciliation
Generating Pix QR codes via REST API for Brazilian merchants
Recurring Pix billing for Brazilian subscription businesses
Webhook-driven payment confirmation for Brazil e-commerce

pros: Native Brazilian Pix support with SDKs
Real-time reconciliation out of the box
SDKs for PHP, Ruby, Java, React
cons: Smaller brand than Pagar.me or Stripe BR
Docs occasionally lag behind API updates
review.verdict: Clean Pix-first gateway for Brazilian devs who want fast SDK integration without enterprise bloat.
review.best_for: Brazilian SMBs and devs building Pix-native checkout with multi-language SDKs
review.not_for: Global merchants needing unified multi-country card processing

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
